title: Marketing
description: We help package the offer, launch promotion and lead users to a request.

items.title: Mass promotion in social media
items.description: Promotion to broad audiences through VK, Telegram, MAX and other social channels.

items.title: VK targeted advertising
items.description: We set up and manage VK ads: audiences, ads, creatives, tests and lead optimization.

items.title: Telegram advertising
items.description: We set up Telegram promotion: audiences, ad combinations, placements, Telegram Ads and analytics.

items.title: Yandex Direct
items.description: Search and ad network campaigns with control over lead cost and traffic quality.

items.title: PPC marketing
items.description: We build paid promotion: channels, goals, funnels, landing pages and performance control.

items.title: Audience segmentation
items.description: We divide audiences by needs, intent, pain points and readiness to submit a request.

items.title: Offers and packaging
items.description: We formulate the offer so users quickly understand the value and next action.

items.title: Marketing funnels
items.description: We design the path from ad and creative to landing page, quiz, form and request.

items.title: Ad creatives
items.description: We prepare images, copy, hypotheses and visual combinations for ad campaigns.

items.title: Landing pages
items.description: We build pages for traffic, segment, offer and a specific conversion task.

items.title: Ad optimization
items.description: We analyze results, turn off weak parts, strengthen working combinations and reduce lead cost.

items.title: Marketing consulting
items.description: We analyze goals, channels, offers, funnel and growth points.

items.title: Advertising consulting
items.description: We help analyze campaigns, budgets, audiences, creatives and launch efficiency.
